content: SUPERVISOR_TOKEN: env var auto-injected when homeassistant_api: true in config.yaml. Use as Bearer token for http://supervisor/core/api/* (REST) and ws://supervisor/core/websocket (WebSocket). No user-provided HA token needed. hassio_api: true grants http://supervisor/ access. Both eliminate the ARGUS_HA_URL and ARGUS_HA_TOKEN env vars entirely in the add-on context.
